subject: fix(mobile): WCAG viewport, safe areas, dvh units, touch targets, sticky actions, cleanup
body:
Viewport & WCAG:
- Remove maximum-scale=1.0 and user-scalable=no from viewport meta tag
  (WCAG 2.1 requires 200% zoom; iOS auto-zoom prevented via 16px inputs)
- Add viewport-fit=cover to enable env(safe-area-inset-*) on notched devices

Safe areas:
- Header uses max(16px, env(safe-area-inset-left/right)) padding +
  env(safe-area-inset-top) for iPhone landscape and standalone PWA mode
- Detail drawer bottom sheet gets padding-bottom for home indicator
- Toast container accounts for safe area insets on all edges

Mobile viewport units (100vh → dvh):
- Import preview modal: 100vh → 100dvh (fixes Safari address bar clipping)
- Detail drawer: 80vh → 80dvh
- All modal mobile overrides: 90vh → 90dvh (ConventionsModal,
  AnalysisModal, QueryHelpModal)
- QueryBuilder body: 50vh → 50dvh

Touch targets (WCAG 2.5.5 — 44px minimum):
- ConventionsModal close button: 32px → 44px on mobile
- AnalysisModal close button: 32px → 44px on mobile
- QueryHelpModal close button: 32px → 44px on mobile
- QueryBuilder help button: 28px → 44px on mobile

Toast overlap fix:
- Mobile toast reverted to top position (below header) instead of bottom,
  preventing overlap with detail drawer bottom sheet

Sticky search actions:
- QueryBuilder action bar (Search/Clear) now sticky for all modes on
  mobile, not just connect mode — search mode had the same unreachable
  buttons problem with multiple pipeline steps

Backward compat cleanup:
- Remove dead snapshot fallback branch in graphService.restoreFromSnapshot
  (snapshots are transient in-memory, always have workspaceId)
- Clean misleading "backward compat" comments in queryParser, useSelection,
  queryEngine test (these describe current API, not compat shims)

Tags: mobile, wcag, safe-area, dvh, touch-targets, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: polish
Semver: minor
